sections.title: Prohibited gambling
sections.content: Gambling conducted otherwise than in accordance with this Act is prohibited gambling. This includes unlicensed casinos and unauthorized gambling operations.

sections.title: Cheating
sections.content: Every person commits an offence who cheats in the course of gambling, whether licensed or prohibited. Cheating includes using fraudulent means to influence the outcome.

sections.title: Search warrants
sections.content: An inspector or constable may apply for a search warrant if they have reasonable grounds to believe that an offence against this Act is being or has been committed.
